channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Wooden Wrench
item.description: Adds a wooden wrench

item.title: Wolp Story Patches
item.description: A collection of patches for the modpack & server that we're running

item.title: Ben's Tuning Cylinders
item.description: Adds music for my friend's server

item.title: VintageTweaks
item.description: VintageTweaks! A collection of small quality of life tweaks I would like to see in Vintage Story.

item.title: Modular Backpacks
item.description: Makes vanilla backpacks modular, allowing you to attach addons to extend storage slots.

item.title: VS Director
item.description: A director camera mod for video production workflows.（导演模式模组）

item.title: MoreInventorys
item.description: The mod adds new inventories for convenient and immersive storage: Shelves, crates, racks for weapon

item.title: Wild Farming Fork
item.description: Cultivate flowers, herbs, mushrooms, trees, and shrubs. And much more.

item.title: xLib Fork
item.description: XLib provides an interface to add skills, abilities and effects to the game.

item.title: xSkills Fork
item.description: RPG-style skill system with abilities, perks, and progression.

item.title: Racial Equality Traits
item.description: Adds just traits to the races from Racial Equality.

item.title: C&N RPG Classes
item.description: RPG classes for Vintage Story

item.title: Dar's Commands
item.description: Some fun admin commands.

item.title: Fog Off
item.description: Removes Fog in select areas

item.title: Temporal Doctor
item.description: Adds temporal doctor outfit, inspired by the plague doctor

item.title: Dar's Server Utilities
item.description: Combines my mods with the intent to be used specifically on Sundered Isles Server

item.title: The Hunter
item.description: Adds animal tracking clues, bleeding, droppings, wounded movement, and carcass carrying.

item.title: Fishy Bucket
item.description: Catch a fish with an empty wooden bucket, then release it alive at a different location.

item.title: C&N Effects
item.description: Adds different potion effects and HUD for tracking their time and tier

item.title: Server Essentials
item.description: Utility commands and functions

item.title: Immersive Woodworking
item.description: Focused immersion mod that makes processing timber feel like work, not paperwork.

item.title: Extreme Weathers [ALPHA]
item.description: Introduces new weather mechanics using the vanilla weather system.

item.title: racialnpcs
item.description: allows npcs of multiple races to be created

item.title: gorniczadolina
item.description: Gornicza dolina - questy

item.title: Boric Alchemy
item.description: Boric Alchemy adds chemical routes to create and refine resources, and create alchemical marvels!

item.title: Riley's Classes
item.description: Addon for Aldi's Classes, makes classes interact with other mods and adds new ones!

item.title: Ferguson rifle
item.description: A breech loading rifle that was used in the American Revolutionary War

item.title: Astria Porta Sounds
item.description: Adds Stargate sounds to Astria Porta's Stargates

item.title: Compost This
item.description: Compost This to accelerate your rot production

item.title: Infantry Dolabra
item.description: Adds a versatile multitool with switchable tool modes for mining, digging, and woodcutting
